sections.paragraph:
μαϰροϑυμία, ας, ἡ [μακροθυμέω] ‘capacity for restraint in face of what is provocative’

—a. in response to obnoxious acts or attitudes patience, forbearance

—α. at the level of interpersonal relationships 2 Cor 6:6; Gal 5:22; Eph 4:2; Col 3:12; 2 Ti 3:10; 4:2.

—β. at the level of relation between God or Christ and human beings Ro 2:4; 9:22; 1 Ti 1:16; 1 Pt 3:20; 2 Pt 3:15.

—b. in response to discomfort or hardship patience Col 1:11; Hb 6:12; Js 5:10.
